_note: Real national stage-chain at central POINT inputs (S5 = $403/ha). The headline $350/ha is the Monte-Carlo MEDIAN of the full parameter distribution (right-skewed, so median < central point). Same quantity, two honest estimators. Per-state cascade fields are NOT invented.
